judge_reason: The two descriptions contradict each other on the specific text visible on the broom: Description A states it reads 'BROOM' while Description B states it reads 'FACTS'.
original_image_tags: A small black-and-white illustration embedded in the text column. It depicts a man in a uniform-style shirt and trousers, seen from behind, looking upward. He is holding a broom over his right shoulder. A small sign with the word "BROOM" is attached to the broom bristles.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned book page with two columns of printed text and one small black-and-white illustration of a person seen from behind carrying a broom or rake over one shoulder; page number “64” appears at bottom right.*
